about_app:
The application of the Qur’an Al Kareem is characterized by its approval of the edition of the King Fahd Complex for Printing the Noble Qur’an in Madinah because of its reliability and mastery.
The Quran Al Kareem application is sponsored by the "Al-Heekmah Library".
It is a well-designed application that allows you to read interactively with the text of the electronic Quran, listen to recitations, study the  Quran Al Kareem and memorize it with ease.
about_app2: Among the most important features of the application :
about_body: We are a library specialized in developing and building applications with Islamic and educational character. We aim to provide reliable and easy-to-use digital solutions that help Muslims read, learn, and stay committed to remembering Allah through beautiful and refined technical experiences. We focus on high performance, accessibility, and multi-platform support to ensure benefits reach the largest number of users.
about_contact_cta: We'd love to hear from you — write to us below:
about_hadith_text: “Whoever follows a path seeking knowledge, Allah will make easy for him a path to Paradise”
about_p1: Alheekmah Library is a comprehensive Islamic platform, born from a passion to serve the Book of Allah and the Sunnah of His Prophet ﷺ. We believe that beneficial knowledge is a trust that must reach every home through the easiest and most beautiful means.
about_p2: We combine the authenticity of content with the beauty of experience, to bring you the Quran with its recitations, Adhkar, and selected books — in one harmonious interface.
about_page_lede: A comprehensive Islamic platform for spreading beneficial knowledge.
about_page_story_1: Alheekmah Library was born from a passion to serve the Book of Allah and the Sunnah of His Prophet ﷺ. We believe beneficial knowledge is a trust that must reach every home through the easiest and most beautiful means.
about_page_story_2: We combine content authenticity with experience beauty, to bring you the Quran with its recitations, Adhkar, and selected books — in one harmonious interface.
about_page_story_3: We focus on high performance, accessibility, and multi-platform support to ensure the benefit reaches the maximum number of users.
about_value_1_desc: We care about the finest details to deliver a refined experience.
about_value_2_desc: Trusted content from approved sources and reliable scholars.
about_value_3_desc: We put user needs first in everything we design.
about_value_4_desc: Open to developers via API and open-source libraries.
about_vision_text: To be the leading Islamic platform, in Arabic and internationally, in spreading beneficial knowledge through refined user experience and trusted content.
aboutAzkaryApp3:
◉ This application allows you to save your favorite dhikrs (remembrances) in a special list, making them easily accessible and reviewable at any time.
◉ You can control the font size and enlarge or reduce it according to your preference for more comfortable reading.
◉ The application also offers three user interface modes - green, blue, and dark - giving you the ability to customize the app's appearance according to your preferences.
◉ What distinguishes "My Dhikr from the Book and Sunnah" is also the ability to easily share dhikrs with friends and family.
◉ You can share directly in text or by sending an image containing the dhikr, enriching and deepening the experience of communication and interaction with others.
◉ You can specify the times you prefer to read the dhikrs, and the application will remind you accurately at those times.
aboutQuranApp3:
◉ This application enables you to read the Quran as if you were reading in the Mus'haf, and you can read in vertical and horizontal mode.
◉ You can also read in variable mode that enables you to zoom in and out as you like.
◉ The application has the feature of textual search in the verses of the Qur’an through real-time search and display of results with pages in addition to the possibility of going to the page as needed.
◉ Addition to bookmarks so that the reader can save the page and return to it whenever he wants.
◉ Addition to notes.
◉ Ability to listen to each verse in voice of different readers.
◉ The app allows interpretation for each verse, you can change between interpretations, and you can resize the interpretation line.
◉ Index of Surahs.
◉ Move between Surahs easily.
◉ The app lets you read the meaning of stop signs.
◉ The application enables you to read the Muslim fortress in full and divided by remembrance so that it is easy for the reader to navigate between sections, and you can add any mention to favorites.
◉ The application allows the reader to read to change color patterns, including the dark pattern, which changes the background color in black and white lines to give the reader complete comfort when reading in a low-light atmosphere.

faq_a1: Use the theme icon in the top bar.
faq_a10: We protect your data, don't share it with third parties, and use trusted infrastructure.
faq_a11: Bank transfer and common online gateways depending on your country.
faq_a12: From the "Contact" tab on this site; your message goes straight to our team without opening a mail app.
faq_a2: Some sections work offline after initial load.
faq_a3: Use the search bar or the Quran tab.
faq_a4: Yes, the UI adapts to all sizes.
faq_a5: Send us a brief via the "Start your project" button and we'll reply within 24–48 hours with clear next steps.
faq_a6: We target iOS, Android, and Web from a single codebase with platform tuning.
faq_a7: Depends on scope; usually 2–8 weeks for small to medium apps.
faq_a8: Based on scope and required features. We share a detailed quote after understanding requirements.
faq_a9: Yes. We offer monthly plans or on-demand updates, improvements, and bug fixes.
faq_api_a: Yes, we provide the open-source quran_library, and an API for the Quran dataset. Developers can explore them from the "Developers" section.
faq_api_q: Do you offer an API for developers?
faq_apps_a: Yes, all our apps are available on the Apple App Store, Google Play, and Huawei AppGallery. You can browse them from the "Our Apps" section.
faq_apps_q: Are the apps available on iOS and Android?
faq_contact_a: You can contact us via the "Contact Us" page, and we are happy to hear your feedback and suggestions to improve our services.
faq_data_a: We source our data from trusted and approved sources, and provide part of it to developers via an open API.
faq_data_q: Where does your data come from?
faq_free_a: Yes, all Alheekmah Library services are completely free and free of annoying ads. We aim to spread beneficial knowledge without any financial obstacles, as a dedication for the sake of Allah.
faq_free_q: Is Alheekmah Library completely free to use?
faq_lede: Everything you want to know about Alheekmah Library and its services.
faq_offline_a: Our mobile apps work offline after the initial download. The website requires a connection.
faq_offline_q: Can I use the apps offline?
faq_page_lede: Answers to the most common questions about Alheekmah Library.
faq_q12: How can I contact you directly?
faq_q3: How do I search inside the Qur'an?
faq_q5: How do I start a project with you?
faq_q9: Do you provide maintenance and updates?
faq_tafsir_a: Yes, we provide multiple tafsirs (Ibn Kathir, Al-Muyassar, Al-Saadi...) and translations in more than 10 languages, with the ability to switch between them easily while reading.
faq_tafsir_q: Is tafsir and translation available for the Holy Quran?
